description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a multi-section layout, featuring a mix of flat and gable roofs. The exterior is primarily finished in light-colored brick and stone, with large windows and several outdoor living spaces, including a rooftop terrace and a spacious patio. A prominent driveway leads to a multi-car garage, and the property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs. At the rear, there is a freeform swimming pool with a small adjacent hot tub and a pair of poolside loungers. The house includes multiple entry points, visible staircases, and a variety of outdoor seating and gathering areas. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional elements, creating a comfortable and upscale suburban appearance.
description: A large, modern house with flat and gable roofs, light brick exterior, multiple garages, and a backyard pool with landscaped surroundings. Features include rooftop terraces, large windows, and several outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two-car garage, driveway, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard pool, hot tub, patio, and rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view with clear visibility of the pool, hot tub, and back patio seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped sets
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a prominent door, small steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway.
